findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem isTotallyReal_iff|/--" TauCeti/LinearAlgebra/TotallyReal.lean` shows a docstring for `IsTotallyReal` at line 29, then undocumented `theorem isTotallyReal_iff` at line 34.
findings.fix: Add a short docstring saying that `IsTotallyReal J L` unfolds to `IsCompl L (L.map J)`.
findings.issue: `isTotallyReal_iff` is a public simp theorem exposing the definition, but it has no docstring.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "^theorem (isCompl|disjoint|inf_eq_bot|codisjoint|sup_eq_top)" TauCeti/LinearAlgebra/TotallyReal.lean` hits lines 42, 45, 48, 51, and 54 with no preceding docstrings.
findings.fix: Add concise docstrings for these exported lemmas, e.g. that a totally real submodule is disjoint from and spans with its `J`-image.
findings.issue: The public basic API lemmas `isCompl`, `disjoint`, `inf_eq_bot`, `codisjoint`, and `sup_eq_top` are undocumented, although the PR advertises basic disjoint/spanning lemmas as part of the feature.

summary: Several public API lemmas added by this module are undocumented despite being part of the advertised basic totally-real API. Add short docstrings describing the result for each exported theorem, especially the iff/accessor and disjoint/spanning lemmas.
